description: Reading pane, word popups, navigation, font scaling, row toggles

tests.name: Reading pane opens
steps: Navigate to Genesis first
Find and click the reading pane toggle button
Verify reading pane becomes visible
tests.pass_criteria: Reading pane element visible with interlinear content area

tests.name: Hebrew interlinear renders
steps: With reading pane open on Genesis
Check that Hebrew words render in the pane
Verify word cards have Hebrew text, transliteration, glosses
tests.pass_criteria: Hebrew word cards visible with original text + glosses

tests.name: Word click popup
steps: Click on a Hebrew word card in the interlinear
Verify a popup/detail panel appears
Check popup shows morphology, Strong's number, definition
tests.pass_criteria: Word popup appears with morphology + Strong's data

tests.name: Word popup closes
steps: With word popup open, click elsewhere on the page
Verify the popup dismisses
tests.pass_criteria: Word popup dismissed on outside click

tests.name: Chapter nav - next
steps: Find and click the next chapter button in reading pane
Verify the chapter number increments
Check new chapter's words render
tests.pass_criteria: Next chapter loads with new interlinear words

tests.name: Chapter nav - previous
steps: Find and click the previous chapter button
Verify the chapter number decrements
Check previous chapter's words render

tests.name: Book selector dropdown
steps: Find the book selector dropdown in reading pane
Change selection to a different book (e.g., Exodus)
Verify new book's interlinear loads
Check language badge updates (Hebrew for OT)
tests.pass_criteria: Book changes, new interlinear loads, language badge correct

tests.name: NT Greek interlinear
steps: Change book selector to Romans (NT)
Verify Greek words render instead of Hebrew
Check language badge shows Greek indicator
tests.pass_criteria: Greek word cards visible, language badge shows Greek

tests.name: Font scale increase
steps: Find and click the font increase button
Verify the font scale label updates (e.g., from 1.0 to 1.1)
Check that word cards visually get larger
tests.pass_criteria: Font scale increases, words visually larger

tests.name: Font scale decrease
steps: Find and click the font decrease button
Verify the font scale label updates downward
Check that word cards visually get smaller
tests.pass_criteria: Font scale decreases, words visually smaller

tests.name: Toggle morphology row
steps: Find the morphology toggle in study controls
Uncheck/toggle morphology off
Verify morphology row disappears from word cards
tests.pass_criteria: Morphology row hidden when toggled off

tests.name: Toggle transliteration row
steps: Find the transliteration toggle
Uncheck/toggle transliteration off
Verify transliteration row disappears from word cards
tests.pass_criteria: Transliteration row hidden when toggled off

tests.name: User mode switch
steps: Find user mode selector (Reader/Student/Scholar)
Switch to 'Reader' mode
Verify interlinear simplifies (fewer rows visible)
Switch back to 'Scholar' mode
Verify all rows return
tests.pass_criteria: Reader mode shows simplified view, Scholar shows all

tests.name: Reading pane fullscreen
steps: Find and click the expand/fullscreen button for reading pane
Verify pane expands to full width
Check that interlinear content is still visible
tests.pass_criteria: Pane expands, content visible, controls accessible

tests.name: Reading pane close
steps: Find and click the close button for reading pane
Verify reading pane is hidden
Check that main content area fills the space
tests.pass_criteria: Reading pane hidden, main content takes full width
